title: No sooner + had + S + p.p. + than + S + V

formulas.formula: No sooner + had + S + p.p. + than + S + V（過去式）
formulas.zh: 一……就……；表達兩個過去事件的緊接先後順序，前事件完成後立即發生後事件

formulas.formula: Hardly + had + S + p.p. + when + S + V（過去式）
formulas.zh: 同義變體，用 hardly 或 scarcely 替代 no sooner，when 替代 than

explanation: 此倒裝句型強調兩個過去動作的緊密時間關係，表「剛……就……」。結構特點：no sooner 置句首引發助動詞 had 提前倒裝，than 後恢復正常語序。需注意前半部分用過去完成式（had + p.p.），後半部分用過去簡單式。此句型較 as soon as 更強調立即性和戲劇效果，常見於正式文章或敘述性文本，增添敘述張力。

examples.eng: No sooner had she arrived at the station than the train departed.
examples.chi: 她一到達車站，火車就開走了。

examples.eng: No sooner had the game ended than the crowd rushed onto the field.
examples.chi: 比賽一結束，群眾就衝上了球場。

examples.eng: No sooner had he finished his homework than his phone rang.
examples.chi: 他剛做完功課，電話就響了。

examples.eng: No sooner had the company announced the news than the stock price fell.
examples.chi: 公司一宣布新聞，股價就下跌了。

extension.tip: 辨別重點：(1) 前半部分必須用過去完成式 had + p.p.，不能用過去簡單式；(2) No sooner 置句首時 had 必倒裝，than 後不倒裝；(3) 可與 hardly...when 或 scarcely...when 互換，表意相同。常誤用為 No sooner had...when（錯誤）。

examples.test: ❌ No sooner the bell rang than students left.
examples.result: → ✓ No sooner had the bell rung than students left.（需倒裝與過去完成式）

examples.test: ❌ No sooner he arrived when the meeting started.
examples.result: → ✓ No sooner had he arrived than the meeting started.（than 不 when）

examples.test: ✓ Hardly had we begun when it started to rain.
examples.result: → 與 No sooner 句型同義，hardly...when 可互換使用

extension.note: 記憶口訣：「No sooner 倒裝 had，前完美後簡單，than 後莫倒裝」

exercises.sentence: No sooner had they finished the exam than everyone celebrated.
exercises.translation: 他們一考完，大家就歡慶了。

exercises.sentence: No sooner had the CEO made the announcement than the market crashed.
exercises.translation: 執行長一做出公告，市場就崩盤了。

exercises.sentence: No sooner had he found his keys than he realized they were lost.
exercises.translation: 他才找到鑰匙，卻立刻發現它們不見了。

exercises.sentence: No sooner had the storm begun than the power went out.

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適合的選項完成句子，表示兩個過去動作的緊密銜接。
mc_exercises.question_eng: No sooner had the bell rung _______ the students rushed out of the classroom.
mc_exercises.explanation: 此題考查『No sooner...than』句型的核心結構。No sooner 開頭引發倒裝，過去完成式『had rung』後須用『than』連接過去簡單式『rushed』，表『剛...就...』。when 與 hardly 搭配；as 和 while 皆不符此句型結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的動詞形式，完成此倒裝強調句。
mc_exercises.question_eng: No sooner had the contract been signed _______ the company announced the merger to the public.
mc_exercises.explanation: 此題測試『No sooner...than』的完整結構。than 後需接過去簡單式『announced』，不能用 when（搭配 hardly）。選項 B 的 when 與 no sooner 搭配錯誤；選項 D 的 before 無法表達『剛就』的立即性，只表『之前』。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據時態邏輯，選擇正確的倒裝句改寫。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the museum closed its doors than we realized we had left our camera inside.
mc_exercises.explanation: 此題考查『No sooner...than』與『Hardly...when』的區別。句中用 than 連接，應選『No sooner had』。Hardly 搭配 when；Scarcely 雖可倒裝但通常與 when 搭配；Just as 無此倒裝用法。句子表『博物館一關門，我們就發現』的立即性。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最符合語境的選項，完成複雜的倒裝句結構。
mc_exercises.question_eng: No sooner had the renowned conductor raised his baton _______ the orchestra launched into a magnificent performance, captivating every member of the audience with its powerful crescendo.
mc_exercises.explanation: 此題綜合考查『No sooner...than』的語法精確性。標準結構為『No sooner had...than S + V（過去簡單式）』，選項 A 符合。選項 B 的 when 與 hardly 搭配；選項 C 多餘倒裝助動詞 did；選項 D 動名詞形式錯誤。句子描述指揮家一舉起指揮棒就掀起樂團演奏的立即效應。
